launch.motion_access: “URL_TBD” would Like to access Motion and Orientation
launch.camera_access: “CatCheck.com” would like to Access the Camera

placement.find_spot: Find the purr-fect spot Tap to Place
placement.permission_warning: We use cookies to measure usage and improve the AR experience. You can accept or decline analytics cookies.
placement.sound_warning: This risk assessor features animal sounds, please plug in headphones or turn down the volume to avoid disturbing others.
placement.multiple_cat: If you have a multiple cat household, please save your results at the end and repeat this assessment for each cat

customisation.fur_pattern: What fur pattern is your cat?

questions.intro: Now for some important questions about me. Please answer as accurately as possible.
questions.outdoor: Does [CAT NAME] go outside in nature?
questions.other_pets: Does [CAT NAME] live with any other pets that go outside?
questions.other_pets_warning: Outdoor pets can bring parasites into the home.
questions.balcony_access: Does [CAT NAME] have access to a balcony, garden or patio?
questions.balcony_warning: Any outdoor access can raise the risk of parasite infection, ask your vet for more information.
questions.hunting: Does [CAT NAME] hunt and eat prey (rather than just play with it)?
questions.hunting_warning: Rodents and other wildlife can carry parasites
questions.raw_meat_warning: Eating raw meat can raise the risk of parasite infection
questions.household_risk: Is anyone in your household under the age of 5, or immunosuppressed?
questions.household_warning: If anyone in your household does have a special circumstance, please speak to your vet

treatment.treatment_heading: Pawsome! Now let’s talk about my parasite treatment
treatment.protection_type: What type of parasite protection do you use on [CAT NAME]?
protection_options: broad spectrum for fleas, ticks and worms
treatment.options_risk_worms: Your cat could be at risk of contracting worms, ask your vet for more information.
treatment.options_risk_fleas: Your cat could be at risk of contracting fleas & ticks, ask your vet for more information.
treatment.options_risk_parasites: Your cat could be at risk of contracting parasites, ask your vet for more information.
treatment.options_risk_dontknow: Please talk to your vet about what parasite protection you currently use
treatment.treatment_frequency: How often do you treat [CAT NAME] for parasites?
treatment.treatment_frequency_worms: How often do you treat [CAT NAME] for worms?
treatment.treatment_frequency_fleas: How often do you treat [CAT NAME] for fleas & ticks?
treatment.preferred_treatment: How often would you prefer to treat [CAT NAME] for parasites?
treatment.preferred_product: What type of parasite product would you prefer to use on [CAT NAME]?

experience_end.thank-you: Thanks for answering! Snap a cute photo of me using the button below to generate my results. Then please share them with my vet!
save_options: SAVE RESULTS AND SHARE WITH YOUR VET
final_instructions: Your results should be saved in your camera roll.
If you have more than one cat, please complete the experience again for them using the button below.

low_risk: Doesn’t hunt and eat prey regularly
